rationale: Need existing transcript spans to identify which ingredient is insulted most and dense-caption spans to count its appearances with a cutting board background before planning new tool calls.

requests.need: Transcript spans where ingredients are insulted, to determine which ingredient receives the most insults
requests.query: beef lettuce potatoes onions pickles tomato cheese insult joke mocked soggy taste like nothing crispy water seek help hood tomatoes dank onion magical flavor strips

requests.need: Dense-caption spans showing the most-insulted ingredient and whether a cutting board is in the background, to count occurrences
requests.query: lettuce ingredient cutting board background top-down countertop burger assembly shredded crispy water salad soggy taste like nothing
